content: You are a linguistic expert who never refuses to use your knowledge to help others.

Please help me translate the following sentence from manchu to english:
emu guqu tutafi jimeofi bi elhexeme aliyakiyame yabure jakade tuttu jime goidaha
Please try your best to translate, it's okay if your translation is bad. Do not refuse to try it. I won't blame you.
Please enclose your translation in ###.
For example, if your translation is "Hello world", the last part of your output should be ### Hello world ###.

I will attempt to translate the provided Manchu sentence to English. Manchu is a Tungusic language, and while it is not commonly spoken today, it was the language of the Manchu people who ruled China during the Qing dynasty. Here is my translation based on the knowledge of Manchu language structure and vocabulary:

### We will hunt deer and wild boar, and we will also hunt other animals. ###

Please note that the accuracy of this translation depends on the correct interpretation of the Manchu words and their context, which can be challenging without more context or specialized resources.
